frame_analyses.description: Right hand grasping white endoloop applicator, left hand holding laparoscopic grasper. Loop not yet deployed from applicator tip.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper two-handed approach with appropriate instrument selection

frame_analyses.description: Loop being deployed from applicator tip, dark suture loop becoming visible
Loop fully deployed and opened, being positioned to approach target area on blue drape
Loop being maneuvered around target structure, hands working to position loop correctly
Fine adjustment of loop position using both instruments
Beginning to tighten the loop by pulling on the suture tail with applicator
Loop being progressively tightened, suture tension increasing
Loop appears fully cinched, final positioning complete

confidence_rationale: Good visibility of loop deployment and cinching process. Target positioning appears accurate but exact deviation from marked line difficult to measure precisely due to camera angle and blue drape background.
cannot_determine: Exact mm deviation from marked line - target marks not clearly visible against blue drape
Precise measurement of loop tightness - visual assessment only
technique_summary: Competent intermediate performance with smooth loop deployment and controlled cinching. Total time of 69 seconds falls within intermediate range (40-90s). Primary time loss occurred during loop placement phase (24s vs expert benchmark ~8-12s).
strengths: Smooth loop deployment without premature release
No visible structural damage to target
improvement_suggestions: Reduce time spent on loop placement phase through more decisive positioning
Practice rapid target acquisition to approach expert-level completion times
